{"cards": [{"name": "Sky Marshal Advisor", "mana_cost": "{1}{W}{U}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["W", "U"], "color_identity": ["W", "U"], "type_line": "Creature — Human Advisor", "oracle_text": "Flying
Whenever ~ enters or attacks, scry 1, then you may draw a card. If you do, gain 2 life.", "flavor_text": "Knowledge guided by wisdom creates order from chaos.", "power": "2", "toughness": "3", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Azorius archetype signpost that combines blue's card selection (scry, draw) with white's lifegain. The flying evasion and defensive stats promote Azorius's controlling gameplan. The triggered ability works on both enters and attacks to provide consistent value. The optional draw with mandatory lifegain creates interesting decisions while staying in both colors' identities."}, {"name": "Bloodpyre Assassin", "mana_cost": "{2}{B}{R}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["B", "R"], "color_identity": ["B", "R"], "type_line": "Creature — Human Assassin", "oracle_text": "Haste
Whenever ~ deals combat damage to a player, that player discards a card and you draw a card.
{2}{B}{R}: ~ gains deathtouch until end of turn and deals 2 damage to target creature.", "flavor_text": "Death comes swiftly to those who stand in the way of progress.", "power": "3", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Rakdos build-around that rewards aggressive play with card advantage. Combines red's haste and direct damage with black's discard and card draw. The activated ability creates interesting combat decisions and removal utility. The 3/2 body for 4 mana is below rate, but the upside abilities justify the cost. Encourages aggressive strategies while providing late-game utility."}, {"name": "Wayfarer's Compass", "mana_cost": "{2}", "cmc": 2, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Artifact", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add one mana of any color. You gain 1 life.", "flavor_text": "Not all who wander are lost, but all need direction.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Simple mana rock that fixes colors while providing minor lifegain upside. Costs 2 mana but taps for any color, making it useful for multicolor decks. The lifegain rider is minimal but relevant in aggressive matchups. Clean, straightforward design appropriate for common rarity."}, {"name": "Temporal Orrery", "mana_cost": "{4}", "cmc": 4, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Artifact", "oracle_text": "Players may activate abilities of creatures they control any time they could cast an instant.
{2}, {T}: Untap target permanent.
{5}, {T}: Take an extra turn after this one.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Complex artifact that creates new gameplay possibilities. The static ability enables instant-speed creature abilities, opening up tactical depth. The untap ability provides utility and combo potential. The extra turn ability is expensive but game-ending. Multiple activated abilities test understanding of mana costs and tap symbols. Rare complexity justified by unique effects."}, {"name": "Seraph of Divine Judgment", "mana_cost": "{3}{W}{B}", "cmc": 5, "colors": ["W", "B"], "color_identity": ["W", "B"], "type_line": "Legendary Planeswalker — Seraph", "oracle_text": "+1: You gain 2 life and each opponent loses 1 life.
−2: Destroy target creature. You gain life equal to its toughness.
−7: You get an emblem with "At the beginning of each opponent's upkeep, that player sacrifices a creature or loses 5 life."", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": "4", "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "Orzhov planeswalker that embodies both colors' philosophies. The +1 combines white's lifegain with black's life drain. The -2 is white's creature removal with lifegain upside. The ultimate creates a punishing emblem that forces difficult choices. Starting loyalty of 4 allows immediate -2 use while surviving. Mythic power level with game-warping ultimate ability."}]}
